case_title: EDWIN LOPEZ VS. DON JUAN SANTOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $110.00 SERVED SEP-21-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, DON JUAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, EDWIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS, DON JUAN $8,430.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, DON JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, DON JUAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-26-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF EDWIN LOPEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONIQUE HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT DON JUAN SANTOS IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
